data.revised_prompt: Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet with exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Subject: cute Q-version elite thunder demon general for Samsara Ascension, chibi armored thunder demon boss, oversized helm, tiny horns, dark bronze armor, compact purple-blue thunder accents, small polearm kept close, fierce cute expression, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Action is idle with real pose changes across frames. Frame 1 top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled. Frame 2 top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders or core lifts, small attached aura brightens. Frame 3 bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth, hair, petals, arms, or weapon sway clearly. Frame 4 bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally. Full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 55 to 62 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes or core face, costume/armor marks, weapon or focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. Entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura fully inside each cell; nothing crosses a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. Background must be 100 percent solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key only, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no cast shadow. No text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, borders, visible grid lines, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art.
